fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to wyoming, speech-language pathologist compact wyoming, wyoming speech-language pathologist endorsement application

telepractice_text: Wyoming permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Wyoming issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Wyoming is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming SLP license cost?
Is Wyoming part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Wyoming allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Wyoming have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Wyoming participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Wyoming without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Wyoming is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
